kis-backtest.description: KIS backtesting MCP server — requires local backtester (bash backtester/scripts/start_mcp.sh)

tradingview-ta.description: atilaahmettaner/tradingview-mcp — 30+ TA tools, backtesting, sentiment (Yahoo Finance data, headless)

tradingview-screener.description: fiale-plus/tradingview-mcp-server — 100+ screener fields, 14 pre-built strategies (TradingView API, headless)

kb-brain.description: LLM Knowledge Base brain — search, read, write wiki articles via FTS5/vector hybrid search (GBrain-inspired)

user-vibe-trading.description: Vibe-Trading MCP — 16 finance research tools (backtest, swarm, factor analysis, options, patterns, market data)

code-review-graph.description: Code Review Graph — AST-based knowledge graph with 22 MCP tools for token-efficient code reviews, blast-radius analysis, and architecture queries
